Premium customer issues related to billing, service outage, or account access should not be handled as low priority. Small refund requests from standard customers may be handled through the normal support process. Refund requests from premium or enterprise customers should be reviewed more carefully, especially when the customer mentions dissatisfaction, renewal risk, or cancellation. The operations team should not approve a refund automatically unless the refund reason matches an existing policy.
